who: clinic managers in medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month
offer: For clinic managers in medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual tracking and reconciliation processes.
problem: manual reconciliation of patient co-pay collections with billing records
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for clinic managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to clinic managers with demo video
Community forums for clinic managers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of patient co-pay data
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
